summary: Iteration 144: Audit Trail Dashboard full E2E testing (backend + frontend). All 24 backend tests pass (100%). All frontend features verified: stats cards, top action chips, quick date ranges, all filter fields, apply/reset, table columns, detail dialog, pagination (25/50/100 per page), refresh button. Feature is fully working end-to-end.

issues: Minor accessibility warning in console: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for {DialogContent}' - not a functional bug

critical_code_review_comments: Per-page buttons (25, 50, 100) in the pagination section do NOT have data-testid attributes, making them harder to test via automation. Low priority but should be added for consistency.
DialogContent is missing aria-describedby attribute - accessibility warning. Consider adding <DialogDescription> or aria-describedby to the log detail dialog.
LogsTab has no dedicated Logs tab navigation test-id in the sidebar - the data-testid='admin-tab-sync' value 'sync' is misleading; consider renaming to 'logs' for clarity.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Used existing 1,485+ audit events in DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Audit Trail Dashboard is fully functional. Navigate to /admin?tab=sync to access it. Login: partner code 'automate-accounts', then admin@automateaccounts.local / ChangeMe123!. Stats API at GET /api/admin/audit-logs/stats returns total/errors/today/by_actor_type/top_actions/top_entity_types. All interactive features work: chips filter, quick ranges, apply/reset, row click dialog, pagination. There are 1,485+ events in DB. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_iter144_audit_logs_dashboard.py (24 tests, all pass).

verified_features.Audit logs list GET /api/admin/audit-log: PASS - pagination, filters, all fields present
